description: Shared tool-access roles for custom agents in this starter.

analysis.intent: Gather evidence and reduce uncertainty without editing files.

planning.intent: Create design artifacts, validate assumptions, and prepare implementation-ready plans without owning application code changes by default.

review.intent: Inspect work and report findings without making changes.

implementation.intent: Implement focused changes and validate them with the smallest relevant commands.

workflow-maintenance.intent: Update workflow assets such as agents, skills, instructions, and runbooks.
